_comment: Concept DOI 10.5281/zenodo.20693143 (all versions). 'zenodo_record' is the version record id used for direct file URLs. The 'files' entry below is a placeholder: no large convenience bundle is deposited yet (the benchmark ships in git and in the deposit). After uploading a bundle, run scripts/fetch_data.py --make-manifest <dir> to populate it.

files.name: hetdocqa_embeddings.tar.zst
files.contents: bge-m3 embedding .npy blobs only (vectors; no source text). Convenience: skip re-embedding. The corpus itself rebuilds from sources via scripts/build_hetdocqa.py.
